# Protagoras

*490 BCE – 420 BCE · Greek (Abdera)*

The most famous of the sophists, author of the saying "man is the measure of all things"; for him, norms hold by the convention (nomos) each city gives itself, not by nature.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
